label: ＋ New Estimate
expected_behavior: Calls window.openEstimateV2Builder() which runs estimate-v2-ui.js open(): lazily builds + shows the full-screen #estV2Modal builder (270-item catalog, presets, tiers, BoldSign).
notes: Primary path to the V2 builder. A duplicate ＋ New Estimate also at dashboard.html:7773/7789 (other views) — this one is the canonical Estimates-view trigger.

label: Classic
expected_behavior: startNewEstimateOriginal(): hides #est-list, shows #est-builder (Classic 4-step wizard), resets estData/selectedTier, sets title 'New Estimate', clears step-1 fields, showEstStep(1).
notes: Legacy ghost button. Distinct from startNewEstimate (which opens the 2-card builder-chooser picker).

label: ← Back to CRM
expected_behavior: goTo('crm') navigates the SPA to the CRM/pipeline view.

label: ＋ Build your first estimate
expected_behavior: startNewEstimate(): opens the 2-card builder-chooser overlay (Classic Builder vs V2 Builder) so the rep picks which builder to start.
reveal_state: after:no-estimates-empty-state (static markup; replaced by renderEstimatesList when estimates exist)
notes: Static empty state in HTML; the JS renderEstimatesList empty state (dashboard-widgets.js:44) shows a different message pointing at Classic/V2 buttons.

label: Classic Builder
expected_behavior: Hides the overlay and calls startNewEstimateOriginal() to launch the Classic 4-step wizard.
notes: Picker built via createElement (no static selector). Two cards + Cancel.

label: V2 Builder
expected_behavior: Hides the overlay and calls window.openEstimateV2Builder() to open the V2 modal builder.

label: Cancel
expected_behavior: Hides the builder-chooser overlay (overlay.style.display='none') without starting a builder.
notes: Overlay also closes on backdrop click (estimates.js:1084).

label: ✎ Edit (card body click + Edit button)
expected_behavior: viewEstimate(id): hides list, shows #est-builder in 'Edit Estimate' mode, resets step-2 form to neutral defaults then restores the saved estimate's fields for a round-trip edit.
reveal_state: after:loadEstimates-has-rows (repeats per estimate card; record one representative row)
notes: Reopen/round-trip path. Card body and the Edit button both dispatch data-act='open'. Step-2 reset at viewEstimate guards the 2026-05-19 corruption bug.

label: ⎘ Duplicate
expected_behavior: duplicateEstimateAction(id): calls window._duplicateEstimate(id) to clone the estimate doc, toasts success/failure, list re-renders.

label: ✏ Rename
expected_behavior: renameEstimateAction(id): window.prompt seeded with current name, on non-empty value calls window._renameEstimate(id, name), toasts result.

label: 👤 Assign
expected_behavior: assignEstimateAction(id): opens showAssignLeadPicker modal (createElement) listing leads to attach the estimate to a customer; row click links via _assignEstimateToLead, also an Unassign option.
notes: Unassigned chip (data-act='assign') on the card body also triggers this; assigned chip (data-act='open-lead') navigates to customer.html.

label: 🗑 (Delete)
expected_behavior: deleteEstimateAction(id): nbdConfirm 'Delete ... This cannot be undone.'; on confirm calls window._deleteEstimate(id), toasts result, list re-renders.
notes: DRIVE ONLY TO CONFIRM BOUNDARY. Guarded by nbdConfirm/window.confirm.

label: 👤 <customer name> (assigned lead chip)
expected_behavior: Navigates window.location to /pro/customer.html?id=<leadId> for the linked customer.

label: ✕ Close
expected_behavior: close(): hides #estV2Modal (removes .open). Draft persists in localStorage/Firestore.

label: Per-SQ (mode tab)
expected_behavior: setMode('per-sq'): sets state.mode, toggles active class on the two mode tabs, re-renders catalog/scope/total via per-SQ flat-rate path.
notes: Paired toggle with Line-Item.

label: Line-Item (mode tab, default active)
expected_behavior: setMode('line-item'): sets state.mode to catalog line-item path, toggles active class, re-renders. Default selected.

label: Insurance (job-mode tab, default active)
expected_behavior: setJobMode('insurance'): sets state.jobMode='insurance' (no tax line), toggles active class, re-renders totals/rollup.
notes: Paired with Cash; drives whether tax line shows in the rollup.

label: Cash (job-mode tab)
expected_behavior: setJobMode('cash'): sets state.jobMode='cash' (tax shown), toggles active class, re-renders totals with county sales tax applied.

label: Good (tier tab)
expected_behavior: Sets state.tier='good', repaints active tier button, re-renders. Per-SQ mode picks the $545 Good rate; line-item mode feeds tier into resolveEstimate material grade. scheduleDraftSave.
notes: Three-way tier toggle (Good/Better/Best).

label: Better (tier tab, default active)
expected_behavior: Sets state.tier='better', repaints active, re-renders. Per-SQ $595 rate. Default tier.

label: Best (tier tab)
expected_behavior: Sets state.tier='best', repaints active, re-renders. Per-SQ $660 rate.

label: County / Jurisdiction (select)
expected_behavior: On change writes state.county (7 options Hamilton/Butler/Warren/Clermont OH + Kenton/Boone/Campbell KY), re-renders so permit cost + sales tax update.
notes: Default hamilton-oh.

label: Property address for auto-measure (input)
expected_behavior: Free-text address consumed by autoMeasure(); not bound to state directly (read at button-click). Mirrors customer address if that is typed first.

label: 📐 Auto-measure
expected_behavior: autoMeasure(): POSTs address to NBDIntegrations.requestMeasurement (HOVER/EagleView/Nearmap), polls Firestore measurements/{jobId} every 4s up to 10min, spreads result into measurements + adds a $75 aerial-report pass-through line.
notes: Requires NBDIntegrations + configured provider secret; surfaces status in #v2measureStatus. May not be exercisable without vendor key.

label: Raw Roof Area (SF) (input)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('rawSqft', Number): writes state.measurements.rawSqft and re-renders catalog/scope/total.
notes: Core driver of every formula-based quantity.

label: Pitch (rise/12) (select)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('pitch', Number): sets pitch (4/6/8/10/12/14), re-renders so pitch multiplier adjusts adjusted SqFt.
notes: Default 8/12.

label: Eave LF (input)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('eaveLf', Number): drives drip-edge / starter / gutter LF-based line quantities; re-renders.

label: Rake LF (input)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('rakeLf', Number): drives rake-edge LF quantities; re-renders.

label: Ridge LF (input)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('ridgeLf', Number): drives ridge cap + ridge vent LF quantities; re-renders.

label: Hip LF (input)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('hipLf', Number): drives hip cap LF quantities; re-renders.

label: Valley LF (input)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('valleyLf', Number): drives valley metal / ice-water LF quantities; re-renders.

label: Pipes (count) (input)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('pipes', Number): drives pipe-boot per-each quantities; re-renders.

label: Chimneys (count) (input)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('chimneys', Number): drives chimney-flash per-each quantities; re-renders.

label: Skylights (count) (input)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('skylights', Number): drives skylight-flash per-each quantities; re-renders.

label: Tear-off Layers (select)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('tearOffLayers', Number 1/2/3): drives tear-off labor surcharge; re-renders.

label: Stories (select)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('stories', Number 1/2/3): drives height/access labor factor; re-renders.

label: Cut-up Roof (+3% waste) (checkbox)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('cutUpRoof', bool): BOOL_FIELDS sets state.measurements.cutUpRoof=true adding 3% waste; re-renders.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Add-Ons)
label: Chimney Flashing (+$425) (checkbox)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('hasChimneyFlash', bool): per-SQ mode adds $425 flat chimney-flash add-on; re-renders.
notes: Per-SQ add-on (W143).

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Add-Ons)
label: Skylight Flashing (+$350) (checkbox)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('hasSkylightFlash', bool): per-SQ mode adds $350 flat skylight-flash add-on; re-renders.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Add-Ons)
label: Valley Metal LF (@ $8.50) (input)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('valleyMetalLf', Number): per-SQ mode multiplies LF by $8.50; re-renders.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Add-Ons)
label: Gutters LF (@ $8.50) (input)
expected_behavior: updateMeasurement('guttersLf', Number): per-SQ mode multiplies LF by $8.50; re-renders.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Presets)
label: Standard Reroof (preset)
expected_behavior: loadPreset('standard-reroof'): clears scope, pushes ~20 catalog codes (tear-off, GAF HDZ, synthetic, IWS, starter, drip, ridge, valley, pipe, chimney, step, vent, dumpsters, permit, labor); re-renders.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Presets)
label: Storm Claim (preset)
expected_behavior: loadPreset('storm-claim'): Standard Reroof scope + insurance doc lines (LAB PHOTO, LAB WALK, CUP IWS-E, CUP KICK) and premium nail line; re-renders.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Presets)
label: Small Repair (preset)
expected_behavior: loadPreset('small-repair'): loads small-job measurement defaults (200 SF / 20 LF eave), 8 repair codes incl DSP HAUL, sets minJobCharge $2500; re-renders + syncs inputs.
notes: Carries baked-in measurements that overwrite typed values.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Presets)
label: Shingle Patch (preset)
expected_behavior: loadPreset('shingle-patch'): tiny 10 SF defaults, 5 barebones codes, sets minJobCharge $500 (trip charge); re-renders + syncs inputs.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Presets)
label: Full Redeck (preset)
expected_behavior: loadPreset('full-redeck'): full reroof scope + OSB decking, forces deckReplacePct=1.0 (partial measurement merge keeps typed area); re-renders.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, left pane, Presets)
label: Hail Damage Insurance (preset)
expected_behavior: loadPreset('hail-damage-insurance'): premium claim scope — impact shingles, code upgrades, hurricane clips, chimney saddle, full insurance doc package (~24 codes); re-renders.

label: Search by code, name, or tag... (input)
expected_behavior: setSearch(value): filters the 270-item catalog by code/name/tag substring and re-renders #v2items (first 50 shown).

label: Category chips (All + per-category, e.g. RFG/LAB/DSP/CUP/PRM)
expected_behavior: setCategory(arg): sets state.categoryFilter to 'all' or a catalog category, re-renders the filtered item list. Active chip highlighted.
reveal_state: modal:estV2Modal (chips generated from NBD_XACT_CATALOG.byCategory; record one representative, repeats per category)
notes: Dynamically generated; count = number of catalog categories + 1 (All).

label: Catalog item row (code + name + $unitCost, Add)
expected_behavior: addToScope(code): pushes { code } into state.scope (no-op if already present), re-renders so the item appears in Selected Scope with its formula-driven quantity + total.
reveal_state: modal:estV2Modal (one row per catalog item, up to 50 shown; record one representative — repeats per item)
notes: Clicking a row toggles it into scope; rows already in scope show green ✓ IN SCOPE and re-clicking is a no-op (use scope-pane × to remove).

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Customer)
label: Customer Name (input)
expected_behavior: Delegated input writes state.customer.name in real time; required for Save name fallback + Send-for-Signature gate. scheduleDraftSave.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Customer)
label: Customer Email (input)
expected_behavior: Writes state.customer.email; required (must contain @) for Send-for-Signature. scheduleDraftSave.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Customer)
label: Customer Phone (input)
expected_behavior: Writes state.customer.phone in real time; scheduleDraftSave.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Customer)
label: Property Address (input)
expected_behavior: Writes state.customer.address; mirrors into the auto-measure address field if that is empty. scheduleDraftSave.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Insurance Claim)
label: Carrier (input)
expected_behavior: Writes state.claim.carrier (string); scheduleDraftSave. Used on insurance-scope doc.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Insurance Claim)
label: Claim Number (input)
expected_behavior: Writes state.claim.number (string); scheduleDraftSave.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Insurance Claim)
label: Adjuster (input)
expected_behavior: Writes state.claim.adjuster (string); scheduleDraftSave.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Insurance Claim)
label: Deductible (input)
expected_behavior: Writes state.claim.deductible coerced to Number; scheduleDraftSave. Used in insurance net-of-deductible math/doc.
notes: Default 2500.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Selected Scope)
label: ✎ (Edit quantity, per scope line)
expected_behavior: overrideQty(code): window.prompt seeded with current computed qty; a number sets scopeEntry.overrides.qty (manual, marked cyan); blank/'auto' reverts to formula; negative/NaN rejected via toast.
reveal_state: after:item-in-scope (repeats per scope line; record one representative)
notes: Per-line-item edit. Manual override bypasses measurement formula.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Selected Scope)
label: × (Remove, per scope line)
expected_behavior: removeFromScope(code): removes the line from state.passThru first (so a measurement-report chip removal works) else from state.scope; re-renders.
reveal_state: after:item-in-scope (repeats per scope line; record one representative)
notes: Removes a single scope line (in-memory, not persisted until Save). Low-stakes delete.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Preview/Export)
label: 📋 Insurance Scope
expected_behavior: finalize('insurance-scope'): builds estimate, formats via EstimateFinalization.formatEstimate, opens the insurance-scope doc in NBDDocViewer (Save/Email/Print/Download). Errors surface as toasts.
notes: Requires scope items + EstimateFinalization loaded. Insurance-scope uses legacy HTML formatter (no server PDF).

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Preview/Export)
label: 💼 Retail Quote
expected_behavior: finalize('retail-quote'): computes Good/Better/Best tier comparison via EstimateBuilderV2.calculateAllTiers, tries server-side renderPdf (Puppeteer) first then falls back to HTML formatter, opens in NBDDocViewer.
notes: Customer-facing tier comparison. Server PDF path may need functions deployed.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Preview/Export)
label: 🔒 Internal
expected_behavior: finalize('internal-view'): renders the internal cost-basis/margin view (material/labor/OH+profit/margin); tries server renderPdf first then HTML formatter, opens in NBDDocViewer. Internal-only document.
notes: This is the V2 internal profit/margin view (NOT-FOR-CUSTOMER).

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, Save)
label: 💾 Save Estimate to Customer
expected_behavior: save(): guards (scope/_saveEstimate/signed-in), builds classic-shaped payload (rows, totals, internal margin, leadId/addr/owner), calls window._saveEstimate, clears draft, exposes _v2SavedEstimateId, status feedback.
notes: Writes estimate doc to Firestore; surfaces in the Estimates list as builder=v2. Round-trip: Save then reopen via list Edit.

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, right pane, E-Signature)
label: ✍️ Send for Signature
expected_behavior: sendForSignature(): requires customer name+email, ensures estimate saved (mints id), renders retail-quote HTML body, calls NBDIntegrations.sendForSignature (BoldSign); on embedUrl opens signing iframe in NBDDocViewer with Brave-block probe.
notes: DRIVE ONLY TO CONFIRM/SEND BOUNDARY — sends a real BoldSign envelope to the customer email. Blocked without BoldSign key (per memory).

route: V2 builder modal (#estV2Modal, collapsible section headers)
label: Section header (Mode/Tier/Measurements/Add-Ons/Presets/Catalog/Customer/Claim/Scope/Export/Save/E-Signature)
expected_behavior: Clicking a section header toggles .collapsed, collapsing/expanding its wrapped content. On screens <=1000px all sections except the catalog start collapsed.
reveal_state: modal:estV2Modal (repeats per section header; record one representative)
notes: Pure UI collapse/expand; ~12 section headers across the three panes.

label: Presets… (Classic preset select)
expected_behavior: applyEstimatePreset(key): sets mode/tearOff/cutUp/add-on checkboxes/gutterLF from ESTIMATE_PRESETS, auto-selects the matching tier card, recalcs (updateEstCalc + calcTierPrices), toasts applied preset.
notes: 5 presets: standard/storm/repair/redeck/hail.

label: ← Back (Classic)
expected_behavior: cancelEstimate(): shows #est-list, hides #est-builder, resets selectedTier/estData/estCurrentStep so the next session starts clean.

label: 📎 Import Quick Measure
expected_behavior: openQMImportModal(): opens #qmImportModal to drag/drop a GAF Quick Measure PDF; on apply, parsed measurements populate the Classic step-1/2 fields.
notes: Modal HTML (#qmImportModal/#qmDropZone/#qmFileInput/#qmApplyBtn) is injected by tools.js — see entries 84-86 for its controls.

label: Property Address (Classic, autocomplete)
expected_behavior: Free-text property address with an autocomplete dropdown (#ac-estAddr); feeds estData.addr used for lead-matching on Save.
notes: Companion fields estOwner/estParcel/estYear (text, no live handler) grouped here as plain identity inputs.

label: Raw SqFt (Classic, input)
expected_behavior: updateEstCalc() recomputes adjusted SqFt/squares from raw area + pitch + waste and updates the calc-result rows.
notes: Step-1 measurement inputs estRidge/estEave/estHip/estPipes all share data-on-input=updateEstCalc (dashboard.html:8491-8494); record raw SqFt as representative.

label: Continue → Roof Type
expected_behavior: estNext(1): validates raw SqFt (>0, <=100000), recalcs, advances to step 2 (showEstStep(2)).

label: Roof Type (Classic select)
expected_behavior: Sets roof type (Hip/Gable/Hip&Gable/Flat/Shed/Gambrel) recorded on estData for the review/PDF. No live recalc handler.

label: Pitch (Classic select)
expected_behavior: updateEstCalc(): applies the encoded pitch multiplier (value 'factor|label', e.g. 1.202|8/12) to adjusted SqFt + squares.
notes: Default 8/12 selected.

label: Waste Factor (Classic select, auto from pitch)
expected_behavior: updateEstCalc(): blank = auto waste from pitch table; explicit 10-25% overrides the waste multiplier in the squares calc.

label: Cut-up roof (+3% waste) (Classic checkbox)
expected_behavior: updateEstCalc(): adds +3% waste to the squares calculation when checked.

label: Tear-off layers (Classic select)
expected_behavior: calcTierPrices(): 2 layers +$50/SQ, 3 layers +$100/SQ applied to each Good/Better/Best tier price.

label: Payment Mode (Classic select: Cash/Insurance)
expected_behavior: calcTierPrices() (tax shown for cash, no tax line for insurance) + toggleInsuranceOverlay() reveals/hides the #estInsuranceBlock claim fields.
notes: Selecting Insurance reveals the conditional claim block (entries 80-82).

label: County (sales tax) (Classic select)
expected_behavior: calcTierPrices(): applies the selected county's sales-tax rate (Hamilton 7.80% … KY 6.00%, default 7.00%) to tier totals.
notes: 7 county options.

label: City (permit) (Classic select)
expected_behavior: calcTierPrices(): applies the selected city's permit fee ($135-$175, default $150) to tier totals.
notes: 11 city options.

label: Valley metal / Chimney flashing (+$425) / Skylight flashing (+$275) (Classic checkboxes)
expected_behavior: calcTierPrices(): each checkbox adds its flat add-on cost (valley metal; chimney +$425; skylight +$275) to the tier prices.
reveal_state: after:estNext-step2 (3 sibling checkboxes; record as group)
notes: Three add-on checkboxes consolidated.

label: Gutter LF (Classic input)
expected_behavior: calcTierPrices(): multiplies gutter LF by the per-LF gutter rate and adds to tier totals.

label: Insurance Claim fields (Carrier/Claim#/Deductible/DOL + RCV/ACV/O&P/Depreciation)
expected_behavior: Plain insurance-claim text/number/date inputs persisted on the estimate for the insurance-scope doc; revealed only when Payment Mode = Insurance.
reveal_state: after:estMode-insurance (#estInsuranceBlock; nested set revealed by the 'Add more' <details>)
notes: Block hidden by default (display:none). Inner RCV/ACV/O&P/Dep fields are further gated behind a collapsed <details> summary at dashboard.html:8624.

label: ← Back / Continue → Choose Package (Classic step 2)
expected_behavior: estBack(2)=showEstStep(1); estNext(2) validates non-negative ridge/eave, recalcs + calcTierPrices, advances to step 3.

label: Good / Better / Best package tier cards
expected_behavior: selectTier(tier, el): clears .selected on all cards, marks the clicked one, sets selectedTier, enables the step-3 Continue button.
notes: Classic tier selector. Prices populate #price-good/better/best from calcTierPrices.

label: ← Back / Continue → Review (Classic step 3)
expected_behavior: estBack(3)=showEstStep(2); estNext(3) requires selectedTier + computed prices, builds the review (buildReview) and advances to step 4. Continue starts disabled until a tier is selected.

label: 📤 Export PDF (Classic review header)
expected_behavior: exportEstimate(): guards grandTotal, builds an escaped HTML estimate document and opens it in a new window (print-to-PDF).
notes: Duplicated as the green Export PDF button at dashboard.html:8700.

label: 💾 Save / Save Estimate (Classic review)
expected_behavior: saveEstimate(): guards grandTotal + re-entrancy, resolves leadId (URL/QM/strict address match), persists the classic estimate doc to Firestore, updates the list.
notes: Two instances (header 💾 Save at :8692 and footer 💾 Save Estimate at :8699) both call saveEstimate.

label: ← Back (Classic step 4)
expected_behavior: estBack(4)=showEstStep(3): returns to the package/tier step.

label: Deposit % override (Classic review input)
expected_behavior: setDepositOverride(val): clamps 0-100, stores estData.depositPctOverride, re-runs buildReview() so the deposit/balance figures update.
notes: Review body built by buildReview(); not present in static dashboard.html.

label: 🔒 Internal View (Classic review)
expected_behavior: toggleInternalView(): shows/hides #internalViewPanel (NOT-FOR-CUSTOMER cost basis, markup, margin) on the review step.
notes: Classic internal profit-view toggle (counterpart of the V2 🔒 Internal finalize button).

label: ↻ Create Revision (Classic review)
expected_behavior: createEstimateRevision(): clones the current estimate as a new revision (version bump, revisedFrom link) for re-quoting.

route: QM import modal (#qmImportModal, injected by tools.js)
label: Drop / browse GAF Quick Measure PDF
expected_behavior: handleQMDrop/handleQMFile: accepts a dropped or chosen PDF, parses measurements, shows #qmPreview and reveals #qmApplyBtn.
reveal_state: modal:qmImportModal (opened via Import Quick Measure button, entry 069)
source_ref: tools.js:13/27/35 (modal HTML injected by tools.js; IDs referenced :15-20)
notes: Modal markup not in dashboard.html static source; reachable only from the Classic step-1 Import button. Owned by tools.js.

route: QM import modal (#qmImportModal, injected by tools.js)
label: Apply (imported measurements)
expected_behavior: applyQMData(): writes the parsed Quick Measure measurements into the Classic builder fields and closes the modal (closeQMImportModal).
reveal_state: after:qm-file-parsed (within modal:qmImportModal; hidden until a valid PDF parses)

route: QM import modal (#qmImportModal, injected by tools.js)
label: Close / Cancel (QM import modal)
expected_behavior: closeQMImportModal(): removes .open from #qmImportModal without importing.
